title: pellaea intramarginalis
intro: Pellaea intramarginalis, also known as the mountain chain fern, is a species of fern in the family Pteridaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pellaea intramarginalis include the potential treatment of various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and reduce oxidative stress. Pellaea intramarginalis can be prepared as a decoction or tea, often combined with other herbs, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
